THE_GOLD_COIN_ROOM.title: The Gold Coin
THE_GOLD_COIN_ROOM.pages.INITIAL.descrip:
You come into a room with a golden coin.
When flipped, it will double on heads, but be destroyed on tails.
Do you risk it?
THE_GOLD_COIN_ROOM.pages.TAKEN.descripti: You pocket the coin and leave the room a bit richer.
THE_GOLD_COIN_ROOM.pages.DOUBLED.descrip: You double the gold! But perhaps there is more to win...
